title: Lichenomima onca Mockford 1991
author: González-Obando, Ranulfo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Lichenomima onca  Mockford, 1991    Diagnosis.  Phallosome with side strut separate, joined by membrane, parameres joined only by membranes, each shaft somewhat swollen in distal one-third, with shelf-like lateral process before apex (Mockford 1991) (Fig. 172); hypandrium triangular, longer than wide, with gently curved lobulate apex, base with short extensions forward at sides (see Fig. 366 in Mockford 1991).   Records:  1 male, COLOMBIA. Valle del Cauca. Santiago de Cali. La Buitrera. 3°22’20.5’’N: 76°34’11.3’’W. 1153m. 01.viii.2009. R. González. Manual collection method. Slide code: 58. 2 females and 1 male. Same locality, collector and collection method. 08.iv.2009. MUSENUV slide code: 31315, 31316, 31317. 1 female. Same locality, collector and collection method. 12–13.viii.2011. 1 male, Meta, Macarena. Resguardo (Etnia Nasa): 1°57’40.04’’N: 73°43’26.94’’W. 275m. vii.2016. J. Panche, J. Hoyos. Led light trap in forest canopy. 5 males, 10 females, Colombia, Santander, El Carmen de Chucuri, La Belleza, Casa Tulipanes, 6°34’2.91”N: 74°7’52.50”W. 247m. MUSENUV slide code: 31318, 31319. J. A. Moreno & N. Herreño, 9.xii.2021.
